channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - insider-gaming.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for insider-gaming.com

item.title: The Legend Of Zelda Live-Action Movie Has Wrapped Filming
item.content:encoded:
After six months of filming, The Legend of Zelda live-action adaptation has officially reached a new major milestone, with production now wrapped.

The update was shared during CinemaCon 2026, where Sony Pictures confirmed that filming has concluded on the project. Director Wes Ball’s adaptation is said to be progressing smoothly, with the team now preparing to transition into post-production.

The Legend Of Zelda Film On Track For May 7, 2027, Release Date

The upcoming The Legend of Zelda live-action film will star Benjamin Evan Ainsworth as Link, with Bo Bragason taking on the role of Zelda. The pair were first spotted in leaked set photos back in November 2025, but Nintendo and Sony have since officially revealed the actors in full costume, offering fans their clearest look yet at the film’s direction.

Beyond the casting reveal, details surrounding the project remain tightly under wraps. There’s still no confirmed plot synopsis or wider cast list, though with filming now complete, a first trailer could arrive in the coming months, potentially shedding more light on what to expect.

Originally slated for release on March 26, 2027, the film was pushed back by two months following a delay announced in June last year. With production now wrapped, the team has over a year to focus on post-production, including visual effects and any potential reshoots. For now, all eyes are on the current May 7 release date, which fans will be hoping remains unchanged.

Of course, this news comes after another Nintendo franchise performed incredibly well on the big screen, with the Super Mario Galaxy Movie earning over $190 in its first five days at the US box office. If The Legend Of Zelda performs anywhere near that level, it’s bound to be another success.

Are you excited for the upcoming The Legend Of Zelda film? What do you think the plot will look like? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

For more game-related film news, read about the Helldivers movie starring Jason Momoa entering pre-production.

Charlie is one of Insider Gaming's Guides Writers who's been in the gaming industry for a little over a year. Unfortunately for him, he enjoys every video game genre out…

More from Charlie Champion

item.title: T1 Player to Miss Rest of Split 1 after Car Accident
item.content:encoded:
T1 has announced that their academy player Kang ‘DH’ Dong-ho will miss the remainder of VALORANT Challengers Korea Split 1 due to injuries sustained in a car accident.

The organization clarified that no one else was harmed in the incident and no further damages were incurred following the single-vehicle crash.

T1 Academy to miss experienced piece

In DH’s place, T1 has announced that Kim ‘TenTen’ Tae-young will play out the rest of the season. TenTen will be familiar with T1A’s playstyle, having featured on T1’s Academy from September 2024 to April 2025.

Still, DH will be missed in T1 Academy for the rest of Split 1 as T1A enters crunch time in VCK Split 1. The roster currently sits in the Lower Bracket final, set to face T1’s regional rivals in Gen.G’s Academy roster.

The winner will progress to the Best of 5 Grand Final of VCK Split 1, with the bulk of the prize money sitting in those top two positions. Third position awards ₩5,500,000 (approximately $3,700), with first place awarding ₩15,000,000 (approximately $10,000).

DH was the most experienced player on the roster, having played in the main team for six months last year before being replaced by Byeon ‘Munchkin’ Sang-beom in the main roster, and demoted back to T1 Academy.

Therefore, the flex player’s experience and versatility may be missed for the remainder of the season as he takes time to recover from injuries sustained in the accident.

T1 statement in full:

We regret to inform you that ‘DH’ of T1A will be unable to participate in the remaining matches of the 2026 VALORANT Challengers Korea Split 1 due to injuries sustained in a single-vehicle accident on Sunday, April 12.

Fortunately, there were no other parties involved or additional damages from the accident. However, following medical advice that ‘DH’ requires a thorough examination and sufficient rest, we have decided he will focus entirely on his treatment and recovery for the time being.

In accordance with VCK regulations, ‘TenTen’ will join the T1A roster as a replacement for ‘DH’ for the remainder of the season.

T1 is committed to providing full support for ‘DH’ throughout his recovery process to ensure he returns in good health as soon as possible.

We ask for your support and well wishes for ‘DH’s’ speedy recovery. We also ask for your warm encouragement for ‘TenTen’, who has stepped up to join the team on short notice.

You can discuss all things Valorant on Insider Gaming’s Discord.
For more Valorant news, see how Valorant’s 2027 revamp may affect the VCL.

Darragh is an Esports Journalist for Insider Gaming specialising in Counter-Strike. He loves to explore how esports teams work, or why they very often do not.

More from Darragh Harbinson

MOBILE APP

item.title: ARC Raiders Update 1.24.0 Full Patch Notes
item.content:encoded:
Embark Studios has just released Patch 1.2.4.0 for ARC Raiders, and it’s another relatively small update that focuses on numerous big fixes and glitches across the game. Again, to sweeten the deal, there are a few cosmetics added to the shop that could be worth checking out.

Of course, this is all in preparation for the major Riven Tides update that’s scheduled for the end of April, with a new map, large ARC threat, and Map Condition all ready to join the game. With that in mind, there won’t be a patch next week, as the team is prioritising finalising all of the new content.

ARC Raiders Fixes Numerous Bugs

The large focus of this update is on bug fixes, with the likes of audio and visuals being minorly adjusted. As well as that, a common glitch where consumables could activate automatically has been fixed, meaning you shouldn’t burn through your heals quicker than intended.

Additionally, those of you who contributed to the Weather Monitor System Project but couldn’t complete it in time should check your in-game inbox in the coming days, as it seems you may be compensated.

It was unclear originally, but it’s also been clarified that the High Gain Antenna Project will also expire when Riven Tides begins, so be sure to complete it asap if you want the rewards!

The full ARC Raiders 1.24.0 Patch Notes are listed below:

  • Addressed several issues that could cause crashes.
  • Fixed an issue where the Vanguard Set caused model stretching for other players.
  • Fixed an issue that could cause players and ARC to sound quieter than intended when there’s no line of sight on Stella Montis.
  • Fixed an issue causing blurry visuals when AMD FSR Frame Generation was enabled.
  • Fixed an edge case where ziplines could be placed on carriables located on an edge of a ledge and the player was below the ledge.
  • Fixed an issue where hold-to-use items (such as bandages) could activate automatically if a quick slot swap was interrupted by pressing the fire key.
  • Players who contributed to the Weather Monitor Station Project but couldn’t complete it in time, please check your inbox in-game in the next few days. Also, a reminder that the High-Gain Antenna Project will expire before the Riven Tides update.

Are you happy with the ARC Raiders patch? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

For more ARC Raiders content, check out the first tease for the Riven Tides map, as well as why the game made Ninja stop streaming.

Charlie is one of Insider Gaming's Guides Writers who's been in the gaming industry for a little over a year. Unfortunately for him, he enjoys every video game genre out…

item.title: Today’s Contexto: Hints & Answer For April 14, 2026
item.content:encoded:
Contexto is a word association game that gives you a new word to guess every single day. With every attempt, the AI algorithm determines how close your guess is to the daily answer based on thematic and contextual similarity.

Sometimes, though, no matter how experienced you are, the word you’re looking for can be incredibly vague and hard to deduce. Luckily for you, this guide is full of hints to give you a helping hand, but make sure you give today’s Contexto a go if you haven’t already!

How To Play Contexto

Contexto is incredibly simple to play, but difficult to master. All you have to do is type words into the search bar, and the AI algorithm will tell you how close your word is to the answer.

You’ll know how close your guess is based on the colour of the bar and the number next to it.

  • Red includes guesses with the number 1,501 and above, meaning you’re way off from the secret word.
  • Orange includes guesses between 301 and 1,500, meaning you’re getting closer, but still some ways off.
  • Green includes guesses between 1 and 300, meaning you’re on the right track.

Best Contexto Tips & Tricks

  • Start off using broad terms, then narrow down once you’ve got under the 1,000 mark.
  • Try using Nouns first, and dip into verbs or adjectives once you’ve discovered the context.
  • Experiment with random words at times, especially as different forms of a root word can rank differently, such as work and worker.
  • Guess away, as unlike other word games like Wordle, you aren’t limited to a strict number of attempts.

Best Starting Words For Contexto

Here are some great starting words to get you going with Contexto:

  • Thing
  • Person
  • Place
  • Animal
  • Work
  • Nature
  • Game
  • Concept
  • Idea
  • Food

Contexto Hints For Today, April 14, 2026

Without giving away today’s Contexto answer, here are a few helpful hints to get you thinking in the right direction:

  • Hint 1: Job
  • Hint 2: Requires an expertise in a subject
  • Hint 3: Typically involves research and experimentation

If they don’t help, then here are the nine closest words, going from tenth to second:

  • Biology
  • Laboratory
  • Professor
  • Research
  • Biologist
  • Scientific
  • Physicist
  • Science
  • Researcher

Today’s Contexto Answer For April 14, 2026

If you’ve tried everything and still can’t figure out today’s Contexto answer, then you can find it down below:

Answer: Scientist

A Scientist is an expert who studies or works in one of the sciences.

When Is The Next Contexto Game?

Contexto is updated daily at 12 AM or Midnight in your respective time zone, meaning the next game will start on April 15.

The Contexto schedule is very consistent, with a new game releasing at the same time every day.

How did you find today’s Contexto? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

For more word game guides, check out the following:

  • Wordle

Charlie is one of Insider Gaming's Guides Writers who's been in the gaming industry for a little over a year. Unfortunately for him, he enjoys every video game genre out…

More from Charlie Champion

item.title: NYT Strands #772 Hints and Answers for Today, April 14, 2026
item.content:encoded:
Strands is a daily word search puzzle game from The New York Times. It is a relatively new game, launched in 2024, in which players seek a common theme among words in a 6×8 letter grid.

Whether it’s your first time playing or you’re a Strands veteran, today’s tips and strategies can help you find words faster. So, if you’ve found yourself stuck with today’s Strands, don’t worry, below you’ll find some helpful hints and even the answers for Strands Game #772 for Tuesday, April 14, 2026

To play today’s Strands, head to the game’s website.

IMPORTANT: The following information includes spoilers on today’s edition of Strands. If you don’t want the answer given to you, stop scrolling.

How To Play Strands

Strands is a daily word search that challenges you to find words with a common theme. There’s also a Spanagram that reveals the deeper theme behind the words.

  • Words that are three letters and under do not count.
  • Words that reveal the correct theme appear in blue.
  • The Spanagram turns yellow when found.
  • Finding three words that don’t fit the theme will reveal a hint to help you find the proper words.

The goal is to string together as many words as possible. Every letter on the grid gets used! Daily puzzles keep players coming back for more, making it a fun brain exercise and a popular online trend.

Strands can only be played on the New York Times website or on the NYT Games app.

Strands Hints For Today, April 14, 2026

The Strands’ answers to the theme of Game #772 are all related to terms you use to describe things not in focus.

General Strands Hints For April 14

Without giving today’s Strands answers completely away, here are a few helpful hints for today to get you started:

  • Hint 1: soulDecision’s one major pop hit in 2000.
  • Hint 2: Opposite of hard.
  • Hint 3: There’s a chance of meatballs in the sky today.

Use these clues to narrow down your searches and increase your chances of solving Strands #772 for April 14, 2026.

Words to Help You Find Strand Hints for April 14, 2026

If you want help getting started without having today’s Strands answer given to you, there are a few starter words worth trying that will help you unlock some in-game hints. A few starter words that may help are:

  • FADE
  • BLUR
  • DOLE
  • CLOUD
  • BEDS

Today’s Strands Answer For Game #772 On April 14, 2026

If you’ve tried everything, including using the above hints, and are still stuck, you can find the answers to today’s Strands below. Check out the answers for past puzzles here.

  • CLOUDY
  • MUTED
  • HAZY
  • BLURRY
  • FADED
  • SOFT
  • BEDIMMED
  • SPANAGRAM: OUTOFFOCUS

If you solved today’s Strands without our answers, congratulations! If not, take note of the best tips above for tomorrow’s puzzle, and check back daily for more hints.

When Is The Next Strands Game After #772?

All New York Times games are updated daily at 12 am or Midnight in your respective time zone. Information about the next game is often available in the hours leading up to it, giving players a heads-up. The game on April 15 will be Strands Game #773.

What Is Strands?

Strands is a daily word search puzzle game created by The New York Times. Launched in 2024, Strands challenges players to discover a common theme among words in a 6×8 letter grid. The game’s original concept was developed by Juliette Seive, a research director on The New York Times Games team, with the aim of replicating Wordle’s success. Tracy Bennett serves as the puzzle editor for Strands, overseeing the creation and curation of daily puzzles since its launch.

For even more Insider Gaming delivered straight to your inbox, sign up for our weekly newsletter.
